name: HTTP & APIs
goal: Understand how the web works and build and consume REST APIs
units: Unit 1: HTTP Basics - request/response, methods, status codes, headers
Unit 2: URLs and DNS - anatomy of a URL, how DNS resolution works
Unit 3: REST Principles - resources, statelessness, CRUD mapping
Unit 4: JSON and Serialization - structure, parsing, common patterns
Unit 5: Authentication - API keys, Basic auth, Bearer tokens, OAuth2
Unit 6: Making Requests - curl, fetch, requests library, error handling
Unit 7: Building APIs - routing, handlers, middleware, status codes
Unit 8: HTTPS and Security - TLS, certificates, CORS, common threats
